title: Novacraft [OG]
description: A modpack made for the NovaCraft Minecraft server.
body:
# Introduction
A modpack for the Novacraft Minecraft server, where you can explore a variety of biomes, structures, dimensions, and tinker with a handful of technology mods like Applied Energistics 2, Create, and more.

On the Novacraft server, the objective is to have fun, advance technologically, and also to play pranks on fellow SMP members for rewards.

You can join the server for Novacraft [here](https://discord.gg/jC5ctmAVC6)!
## Requirements
We don't have exact requirements to run this pack, but we suggest you play this pack with a decent CPU and at least 16 GB of RAM so that your computer doesn't run low on RAM, the pack can run on 8 GB of RAM but results may vary.

In the off chance you are having issues with the pack, we will do our best to troubleshoot your problems and get you into the game.
